objective: Create the missing repo-local Stage 6 closeout record for downstream SoM waterfall routing propagation epic #439 after all downstream child PRs merged.
scope_boundary: Capture downstream epic #439 merge and closure evidence in repo-local Stage 6 artifacts.
Update governance backlog/progress mirrors for the closeout trail.
Do not edit downstream product repositories.
out_of_scope: Changing the SoM routing decision already landed by issue #432 / PR #433.
Reopening downstream child issues or PRs.
Editing downstream repository docs, workflows, or runtime configuration.
Changing GitHub branch protection or automerge rules.
research_summary: Issue #432 has a source-of-truth Stage 6 closeout, while downstream epic #439 only had GitHub issue closeout comments and no repo-local Stage 6 artifact. The closeout slice records final merged PR evidence, child issue closure, required check outcomes, and the distinction between source SSOT closeout and downstream propagation closeout.

sprints.name: Downstream propagation closeout
sprints.goal: Record durable Stage 6 evidence for epic #439.
tasks: Create the issue #463 structured plan and execution scope.
Create the issue #439 downstream propagation closeout artifact.
Record validation evidence and merge commits for all child PRs.
Run the Stage 6 closeout hook and focused governance validation.
Open a PR and allow repo automerge rules to merge once green.
acceptance_criteria: The closeout artifact links #432, PR #433, #439, and all downstream child issues and PRs.
The closeout artifact records all six downstream merge commits.
The closeout artifact states that all child issues and epic #439 are closed.
Validation evidence records the commands run and their PASS/SKIP results.
The PR is issue-backed by #463 and uses an isolated issue branch.

specialist_reviews.focus: Compare issue #432 Stage 6 artifact with epic #439 final merge evidence.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed #432 closeout only linked downstream follow-up issues and did not include final #439 merge evidence, requiring this issue-backed closeout slice.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a closeout evidence slice, not a standards or architecture change requiring cross-family review.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Write only issue #463 closeout, validation, plan, execution-scope, graph/wiki hook outputs, and backlog/progress mirrors.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run closeout hook, focused validators, open PR, and allow automerge when green.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repository changes appear necessary, stop and open a downstream issue instead of editing product repos.
If validation discovers a live policy defect beyond closeout evidence, create or update a separate governance issue.
If closeout hook graph refresh changes broad graph/wiki outputs, include only the hook-produced artifacts required by Stage 6.
approved_by: operator request: proceed with stage 6 closeout, new gh issue / pr
